text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The URA Finale comes to a close as a great
success, and what's more...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
<chrname>'s presence greatly
enlivened the racecourse, leaving Director
Akikawa immensely satisfied.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
<chrname>'s presence greatly
enlivened the racecourse, filling the crowd with
excitement.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Director Akikawa then prepares a meal for me to
celebrate the success of the URA Finale.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
There, she presents me with her fan, as well as a
deluge of compliments.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I place the fan carefully in my pocket and vow
alongside <chrname> that I won't
betray Director Akikawa's passion!
